## Source: amazon-inspector (20b2e29319a8cb96867858b20a43a684624167dc62c186de47de7e7e7e8c8a2a)
The package @mesh-components/customthemeprovider was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (0ba7699d05c1cb95acd0b80e8a03bc6cb8eb0fa29339f261fe7d5d637ecd7550)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified '@mesh-components/customthemeprovider' @ 99999.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
